description: Presentation contract for the BrandInput controls (labels/groups/UI ranges/knob types). Rendered by the Figma plugin, the web playground, and the MCP tool schema. Kept in sync with theme-schema.json by engine/test.ts. Emitted by engine/emit-levers.ts. Note: brand `id` is host-supplied identity, not a lever.

levers.label: Primary brand color
levers.description: The exact brand anchor. Pinned, never shifted; the engine places it on the ramp by its lightness.

levers.label: Neutral hue
levers.description: Hue the greys lean toward (a small chroma tints them to the brand for cohesion).

levers.label: Neutral chroma
levers.description: Peak neutral chroma (~0.004–0.02); tapers to near-0 at the ramp ends. 0 = pure grey.

levers.label: Pin a neutral
levers.description: Optional. A pre-defined brand grey, pinned verbatim at its lightness step; the ramp is built around it (hue/chroma from the anchor) instead of the cast. Set for a client that ships their own neutral; omit to derive from hue + chroma.

levers.label: Additional brand colors
levers.description: Secondary / tertiary / accents — any number; each becomes its own ramp and can drive actions.

levers.label: Action palette
levers.description: Which palette drives interactive/action color. Defaults to primary; point at an accent when the hero color is a poor CTA.

levers.label: Success color
levers.description: Optional measured override; omit to let the engine synthesise from a canonical hue.

levers.label: Warning color
levers.description: Optional measured override; omit to synthesise.

levers.label: Danger color
levers.description: Optional measured override; omit to reuse the brand red (if red) or carve a dedicated one.

levers.label: Info color
levers.description: Optional measured override; omit to synthesise from the canonical blue hue.

levers.label: Page surfaces
levers.description: Non-default page surface per mode (e.g. a warm off-white). The contrast floor moves with it.

levers.label: Corner softness
levers.description: 0 = sharp, 1 = default, 2 = soft. Scales the radius ramp.

levers.label: Density
levers.description: Drives component sizes (control height + paired padding). The name stays stable; the metrics shift.

levers.label: Radius anchor
levers.description: The radius.md value (px) at scale 1.

levers.label: Spacing rhythm
levers.description: Base of the numbered-multiplier space scale (space.100 = 1×).

levers.label: Fine grid base
levers.description: Fine dimension-grid base backing radius/borders.

levers.label: Type scale
levers.description: Shifts heading sizes (display + title) up/down the ladder; body/label/caption stay put.

levers.label: Font families
levers.description: Display / text / mono faces (+ a variable-font flag). A single name auto-pads a system fallback stack.

levers.label: Weight roles → numeric
levers.description: Map subtle/default/emphasis/strong/max to the brand’s numeric weights (defaults 300/400/600/700/900).

levers.label: Display size ceiling
levers.description: Cap the display tier; brands with no mega heroes stop lower (e.g. 96).

levers.label: Title floor
levers.description: Smallest title size. 16 adds a 16px brand-font heading that overlaps body.md.

levers.label: Responsive type
levers.description: Fluid heading sizing on/off + the min/max viewport pair driving clamp() and the Figma modes.

levers.label: Per-role weight sets
levers.description: Which weights each type role ships (weight is an axis on every role; adding one is additive).

levers.label: Role → family map
levers.description: Which family role each semantic group consumes (e.g. neutral buttons: label → text).

levers.label: Underlined link roles
levers.description: Which roles get an underlined .*-link variant. Default body + caption.

levers.label: Italic roles
levers.description: Which roles ship an .*-italic variant per weight (fontStyle:italic). Default none — italics are opt-in.

levers.label: Motion tempo
levers.description: Scales the duration ramp (snappy ×0.8, standard ×1.0, relaxed ×1.3). Reduce-motion is derived.

levers.label: Emphasized easing
levers.description: Optional 4-number cubic-bezier override for the expressive easing curve.

levers.label: Shadow softness
levers.description: Blur:offset dial. Low → crisp/product; high → soft/marketing.

levers.label: Shadow tint
levers.description: Hue-shift the shadow base off pure black (hue + amount). Defaults to a subtle neutral tint.

levers.label: Breakpoints
levers.description: Min-width floors (px), ascending. Names auto sm/md/lg/xl/2xl. Default [0,768,1024,1440,1920].

levers.label: Grid columns
levers.description: Base column count for the design grid (16/24 for dense-data brands).

levers.label: Container max
levers.description: Content max-width cap; layout is fluid below it.

levers.label: Narrow container
levers.description: Reading-measure container (~65–75ch).

levers.label: Icon contrast floor
levers.description: Whether icons mirror text contrast or run against the WCAG 1.4.11 non-text floor.

levers.label: Disabled strategy
levers.description: Accessible keeps disabled text legible on the floor; conventional uses the field-standard dimmed look.

levers.label: Disabled contrast floor
levers.description: Contrast floor for the accessible disabled strategy (escalates to 4.5:1 in high-contrast).

levers.label: Outline hover
levers.description: How outline/text controls express hover/pressed/selected. Overlay = translucent neutral wash (composites over any surface); solid-tint = opaque foreground.<color>-subtle; none = omit.

levers.label: Neutral emphasis
levers.description: The neutral interactive fill boldness — subtle light grey (a surface) or a strong near-black/near-white fill.

levers.label: Inverse surface-context
levers.description: Generate interactive.<color>.on-inverse inks for controls on a dark hero / inverse section (a light CTA on dark).

levers.label: Interactive palettes
levers.description: Promote declared palettes (a `brandColors` entry, or `primary`) to full interactive.<name>.* columns — fill/states, on-fill, text, border, overlay. The generalised accent lever; edit via the interactive cards. Supersedes the back-compat single-column `accentPalette` input.

levers.label: Gradients
levers.description: Opt-in (off by default). On ships one default brand gradient; an explicit array ships specific ones.
